revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing last templates I do not have
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories

revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = British rule in Burma | shortname alias = Burma | flag alias = British Burma 1937 flag.svg | flag alias-union = Flag of the United Kingdom.svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = union | related1 = Burma | related2 = Konbaung dynasty | related3 = State of Burma | related4 = Union of Burma | related5 = Socialist Republic of the Union of Burma | related6 = Union of Myanmar </noinclude> }}
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n \n</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_British_Burma here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_British_Burma for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>}}} | alias = British rule in Burma | shortname alias = Burma | flag alias = British Burma 1937 flag.svg | flag alias-union = Flag of the United Kingdom.svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = union | related1 = Burma | related2 = Konbaung dynasty | related3 = State of Burma | related4 = Union of Burma | related5 = Socialist Republic of the Union of Burma | related6 = Union of Myanmar </noinclude> }}
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n \n [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
